title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 256.350 - Law not to affect existing contracts
text:
256.350.  Law not to affect existing contracts. — Nothing in sections 256.280 to 256.350 shall be construed as preventing consummation of a contract between a municipality, water district, county, or political subdivision of this state, and a federal department for water storage.
(L. 1965 p. 389 § 7)
